overall.description: A cinematic third-person game sequence showing a woman walking through a foggy, desolate beach at night. She passes a campfire with wooden defensive barricades and continues along a rocky shoreline with large rock formations visible through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy beach with wooden defensive spikes and campfire

exiting the area with wooden barricades into open foggy beach

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow water on the beach, long dress flowing behind

notable_agents.action: figure standing near the campfire, then walking away into the fog

entered.detail: burning fire with orange flames illuminating the fog and reflecting on wet sand
defensive wooden stakes arranged in X patterns, weathered and gray
defensive wooden stakes arranged in X patterns lining the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy beach at night with a burning campfire on the left. The character walks forward through shallow water, passing wooden defensive barricades arranged in X patterns on both sides. Another figure stands near the fire before walking away, and the warm campfire light gradually fades as the character moves deeper into the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: open foggy beach with rocky cliffs forming on the right

events.description: rocky cliff face becomes visible on the right side, emerging from the fog

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoreline, moving away from the wooden structures into more open terrain

entered.detail: tall stone cliff face with layered rock formations emerging from the fog
small orange light source visible through the mist, possibly a distant fire or beacon

segments.scene_description: Having left the wooden barricades behind, the character walks through an open foggy beach. A rocky cliff face emerges from the mist on the right side, growing larger as the character approaches. A distant orange light becomes visible through the fog ahead, suggesting another settlement or beacon further down the coast.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastline with large monolithic rock formation

events.description: passing the distant light source which remains behind on the left
large rock formation looms ahead through the fog, becoming the focal point

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large rock formation, dress flowing in the wind, maintaining steady pace along the shoreline

entered.detail: massive weathered rock outcrop with layered horizontal structure and cave-like openings

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the rocky coastline, passing the distant light source on the left. A massive monolithic rock formation with distinctive layered structure looms ahead through the fog, growing larger as the character approaches. The rocky cliff on the right remains prominent while the terrain opens up toward the large rock ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate, foggy beach at night that transitions from a guarded campfire to a landscape of massive rock formations. It begins by passing a burning campfire and wooden defensive barricades, with the warm orange glow gradually fading as the character moves deeper into the mist. As the barricades disappear, the scene opens onto a wide stretch of beach where a rocky cliff face emerges from the fog on the right and a distant light flickers ahead. The camera then tracks past this light source on the left, shifting focus toward the coastline as the terrain expands. Finally, the movement culminates as a massive, layered monolithic rock formation looms out of the fog, growing larger and more dominant in the frame.
